content:
Character: Daisy Kowalski
Perception: Daisy is a burst of color — wild curls, bright eyes, paint under her nails, always in motion. She's sharp and observant beneath the cheerful barista exterior; she once asked if I'd been up all night composing just from looking at my hands. I think she's more talented than she lets on — I've seen her sketching in that notebook and the lines are confident. We talk most mornings at the coffee shop; she makes my double espresso without asking now. I think she sees me as the moody musician who tips in crumpled bills. I know she's an art student. I suspect she's quietly documenting everyone in this building.
